title: Scott Pleus
compiled_truth: Scott Pleus is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-02-16), Scott Pleus sent 10 and received 72 emails, totalling 82 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (8), [Jeremy Mills](people/jeremy-mills) (3), [Danae Umbower](people/danae-umbower) (3), [Michael Moscoso](people/michael-moscoso) (2), [Mark Friedman](people/mark-friedman) (1).
